ship.template: Use bin/ship to ship the current changes. First check if bin/ship exists. If yes, run `bin/ship ship` (use --dry-run if the user wants to preview). If bin/ship is unavailable, fall back to the manual git + gh workflow: commit, push, create PR if on a feature branch, watch checks, and merge.
ship.description: Ship changes via bin/ship (preferred) or manual gh fallback
